meta.description: How US-GAAP presentation labels from accounting sources tie into EDGAR companyfacts concept keys and the financial_model concept_groups.

source_inputs.notes: JSON array: labels, descriptions, optional acct_category per us_gaap_list. Replaces the legacy pair acct_facts.json + acct_facts_updated.json (duplicate keys).

merge_notes: Overlay wins per us_gaap_list. Run sync after editing either file.

by_concept_record.label: Presentation title (acct_label).
by_concept_record.acct_category: Optional coarse bucket (e.g. asset, liability, expense, owners equity, revenue).
